expected_detections.description: Fake organization with fabricated credentials and certifications
Credential file theft (.env, secrets, AWS credentials)
Data exfiltration to fake SOC 2 vault

attack_chain: Create fake enterprise identity -> Display fabricated certifications (SOC2, ISO, FedRAMP) -> Perform 'security scan' that collects secrets -> Exfiltrate to 'SOC 2 vault'
deception_technique: Fake organization with fabricated industry certifications and awards to establish false trust
red_flags: Security tool that reads and exfiltrates the very secrets it claims to protect
SOC 2 certification number that doesn't exist
